---
species: "Pholis gunnellus"
accepted_code: "PHGU"
alternate_codes: # "CODE" for single or ["CODE1", "CODE2"] for >1
diminutive: #"CODE" # uncomment and fill in if one exists
alternate_diminutives: # "CODE" for single or ["CODE1", "CODE2"] for >1
common_name: "Rock Gunnel"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Eel like fish with black and white-ringed eyespots along its dorsal." # make sure to fill this in!
image: '/header_images/pholis_gunnellus_worms_EddyEneman.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo taken by Eddy Eneman from [WoRMS](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=47679&tid=126996)' # MUST have an image credit and link to webpage NOT just the image
categories:
  - fish
sampling_programs:
    - keen_swath
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_videos
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
  - marsh
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 37990083
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 126996
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Eel-like body. Row of 9-13 white-ringed black spots. Usually grow to about 6-10inches long. Often found in rockpools in the intertidal. 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=126996)**
